UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS XIAO CHUAN WU AND ANNIE LI'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO MAINTAIN CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CC 789.3, FORCIBLE DETAINER AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. PLAINTIFF'S NON-COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 2.112 AND UNCERTAINTY WERE NOT ASSERTED AS GROUNDS FOR THIS MOTION IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION. DEFENDANTS IMPROPERLY RAISE ISSUES OF FACT REGARDING THEIR MOTIVATION FOR CHANGING THE LOCKS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Continued To Dec-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT XIAO CHUAN WU, ANNIE LI Mtn For Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatory-General, Set One; Req. For Production Of Documents And Tangible Things, Set One And Monetary Sanction Req. Against Deft/And Its Attorney Of Record is continued to December 3, 2014 as the moving party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies to Department 302 no later than November 21, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrey Kalinin, Esq. of Kalinin, To & Long, (415-386-8136), for Pak Kin Cheng, Plaintiff and opposing party.
No appearance by Defendant and moving party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS XIAO CHUAN WU and ANNIE LI's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to maintain causes of action for violation of CC 789.3, forcible detainer and Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress. Plaintiff's non-compliance with CRC 2.112 and uncertainty were not asserted as grounds for this motion in the notice of motion. Defendants improperly raise issues of fact regarding their motivation for changing the locks. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
